Thanks for the PR. Please run through this checklist to keep review fast.

<!-- Short description: what changed and why. -->

## Related Issue

<!-- Link an issue when there is one. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes without warnings
- [ ] `npm test` passes, including new tests for changed behavior
- [ ] Documentation / JSDoc updated where relevant
- [ ] Public API changes update README and `docs/`
- [ ] New features were discussed in an issue before implementation
- [ ] No runtime dependencies were added

## Size

- [ ] < 50 lines
- [ ] 50-200 lines
- [ ] > 200 lines (was there an RFC?)
